calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar Feb-14-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name.
Dept. 218, Commissioner: William R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
William Wong, Esq. appeared with petitioner Wing Chiu Siu, a/k/a Wing C Siu.
Petitioner, Wing Chiu Siu, a/k/a Wing C Siu, was placed under oath examined.
Carlin Xiao was placed under oath and served as Cantonese speaking interpreter for petitioner.
Proof of publication in file. Substitution of Attorney filed today.

No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name to: Yong Zhao Xiao.

Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
